description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly light gray and black color scheme accented by blue highlights and digital markings. The body is constructed with a robust, polygonal frame, incorporating a skeletonized stock and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The upper receiver is fitted with a raised sight rail, and the magazine is integrated into the lower section, suggesting a detachable box type. The barrel is short and compact, with no visible muzzle device attached. The rifle's surface appears to be made of a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a modern, tactical appearance. Its overall build suggests it is lightweight yet durable, suitable for rapid deployment in urban environments.
description: A futuristic, angular rifle with a light gray and black body, blue accents, a skeletonized stock, and a compact barrel. The design is modern and tactical, with digital markings and ergonomic features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and digital markings on the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the compact barrel, sight rail, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine area, stock structure, and additional blue accents.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's open framework and the alignment of the sight rail.
